sources.title: Iranian drama ‘Summer With Hope’ wins top Karlovy Vary prize
sources.description: "Summer with Hope" vence em Karlovy Vary 430 visninger 10. jul. 2022 "Summer with Hope", uma coprodução canadiana e iraniana, da cineasta Sadaf Foroughi, ganhou o Globo de Cristal do Festival de Cinema de Karlovy Vary LEIA MAIS : https://pt.euronews.com/2022/07/10/su... Subscreva: https://www.youtube.com/c/euronewspor... Euronews TV em direto: https://www.youtube.com/c/euronewspor... euronews está disponível em 12 línguas:

metadata.Plot: A prestigious competition sets the stage for a conspiracy of collusion between two young swimmers, family members, and their communities.
metadata.Actors: Leili Rashidi, Mahdi Ghorbani, Kiarash Anvari
